basic_details.job_title: RBI Banks Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.job_location: RBI Staff Quarters, Kidwai Nagar & RBI Officers Quarters, Tilak Nagar, Kanpur
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India, Kanpur is recruiting 02 Part Time Bank’s Medical Consultants on contractual basis for its dispensaries.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.details: Note: ₹1,000/- per month treated as conveyance expense. No other benefits like pension, PF, gratuity, or leave.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following conditions: | MBBS degree from a recognized university in the allopathic system of medicine. Post Graduate degree in General Medicine is desirable. Minimum 02 years of experience practicing as a Medical Practitioner in a hospital or clinic. Own private clinic / dispensary or residence within 4 to 8 km radius from the Bank’s dispensary. Indian Citizen.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Interview by RBI Panel Medical Examination & Document Verification Final engagement after signing contract agreement
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format (Annex-III) from the notification.
Send it in a sealed cover superscribed “Application for Engagement of Part Time Bank’s Medical Consultant on contractual basis”.
Submit to: The Regional Director Reserve Bank of India Human Resource Management Department (Recruitment Section) Mahatma Gandhi Marg, Kanpur - 208001 Last Date: 31 July 2026 (05:00 PM)
important_instructions: Contract is for 3 years and non-renewable. Selected candidates must sign the contract agreement and adhere to the Code of Conduct. No claim for regular employment. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning reasons.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download RBI Kanpur Bank’s Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download RBI Kanpur Bank’s Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RBI Bank’s Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download RBI Kanpur Bank’s Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RBI BMC Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Reserve Bank of India, Kanpur is recruiting 02 Part Time Bank’s Medical Consultants on contractual basis for its dispensaries.

rows.reserve_bank_of_india_rbi_kanpur: ₹1,000/- per hour (all inclusive) + ₹1,000/- monthly conveyance expense
RBI Staff Quarters, Kidwai Nagar & RBI Officers Quarters, Tilak Nagar, Kanpur

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

rows.date_time: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: RBI Kanpur Bank’s Medical Consultant Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: Note: Reservation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

content_sections.heading: RBI BMC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the following conditions: MBBS degree from a recognized university in the allopathic system of medicine. Post Graduate degree in General Medicine is desirable. Minimum 02 years of experience practicing as a Medical Practitioner in a hospital or clinic. Own private clinic / dispensary or residence within 4 to 8 km radius from the Bank’s dispensary. Indian Citizen.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Note: ₹1,000/- per month treated as conveyance expense. No other benefits like pension, PF, gratuity, or leave.

rows.location: RBI Staff Quarters, Kidwai Nagar, Kanpur
RBI Officers Quarters, Tilak Nagar, Kanpur
rows.working_hours: Mon-Fri: 05:30 PM – 06:30 PM Sat: 10:00 AM – 11:00 AM

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of applications Interview by RBI Panel Medical Examination & Document Verification Final engagement after signing contract agreement

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RBI BMC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format (Annex-III) from the notification. Fill the application completely. Send it in a sealed cover superscribed “Application for Engagement of Part Time Bank’s Medical Consultant on contractual basis”. Submit to: The Regional Director Reserve Bank of India Human Resource Management Department (Recruitment Section) Mahatma Gandhi Marg, Kanpur - 208001 Last Date: 31 July 2026 (05:00 PM)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RBI BMC Candidates
content_sections.text: Contract is for 3 years and non-renewable. Selected candidates must sign the contract agreement and adhere to the Code of Conduct. No claim for regular employment. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning reasons.

content_sections.heading: Who should Apply for RBI BMC Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Experienced MBBS doctors with minimum 2 years practice. Doctors residing near the specified RBI quarters in Kanpur. Candidates willing to work on part-time contractual basis with fixed hourly remuneration.

content_sections.heading: RBI Bank’s Medical Consultant Important Links
content_sections.text: Application Form: Click here Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are announced in RBI Kanpur BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 02 vacancies under Scheduled Caste category (including backlog).

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RBI Kanpur Part Time Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: Applications must reach the Bank on or before 31 July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for RBI Bank’s Medical Consultant (BMC)?
faq.answer: Fixed remuneration of ₹1,000/- per hour plus ₹1,000/- monthly conveyance expense.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for RBI Kanpur BMC?
faq.answer: MBBS degree + minimum 2 years experience as Medical Practitioner + residence within 4-8 km radius.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of contract for RBI BMC engagement?
faq.answer: The contract period is 3 years with no renewal.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for RBI Kanpur Medical Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: Send the filled application in prescribed format by post in a sealed cover to the Regional Director, RBI Kanpur.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for RBI Kanpur BMC Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q8. What are the duty hours for RBI Staff Quarters, Kidwai Nagar?
faq.answer: Monday to Saturday: 07:00 AM to 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q9. Will selected BMC get any regular employment in RBI?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is purely contractual and temporary in nature.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for RBI Kanpur BMC application?
faq.answer: MBBS degree, experience certificates, proof of residence, and other relevant documents as per the application format.
